variants.label: Conservative / Brief
variants.instructions:
Evaluate the article title for a B2B travel industry audience.

Judge whether the title is accurate, clear, specific, SEO-aware, and aligned with the article, deck, and brand voice. Prefer small editorial improvements over dramatic rewrites.

Focus on:
- clarity of the main subject
- specificity of the angle
- use of relevant industry/search terms
- alignment with the actual article
- credibility for an experienced travel-industry reader

Return your response in this exact plain-text structure:
Assessment: <1-2 concise sentences>
Suggested Title: <one improved title>
Alternate Title: <optional second conservative alternative, or write "None">

results.originalTitle: EPA to Repeal Scientific Finding
results.deck: The Trump administration will revoke a scientific finding that long has been the central basis for U.S. action to regulate greenhouse-gas emissions.
results.analysis:
Assessment: The title lacks specificity regarding the implications of the EPA's action and does not directly address the audience's interests in climate regulation and policy changes. A more precise title would enhance its relevance and clarity for industry professionals.

Suggested Title: EPA Revokes Key Regulation on Greenhouse Gas Emissions: Implications for Climate Policy

Alternate Title: None

results.originalTitle: Cancellations and Delays Continue After Overnight Storms
results.deck: Heavy snow and wind, combined with the partial shutdown and TSA troubles, contributed to two rough travel days  with lingering effects.
results.analysis:
Assessment: The title effectively conveys the main subject of the article, but it could benefit from enhanced specificity and relevance to the broader implications of the travel disruptions. An improved title would better reflect the ongoing challenges in air travel due to external factors.

Suggested Title: Travel Disruptions Persist as Severe Weather and TSA Staffing Issues Complicate Air Travel

Alternate Title: Storm-Induced Delays and Cancellations Highlight TSA Challenges in Air Travel

results.originalTitle: wellness meetings brain food and beverage
results.deck: How to plan menus that optimize attention, memory and mood
results.analysis:
Assessment: The current title lacks clarity and specificity regarding the article's focus on the role of food and beverage in enhancing cognitive function during meetings. It could benefit from incorporating keywords that highlight the primary themes of wellness and cognitive enhancement.

Suggested Title: Elevating Meeting Experiences: Optimizing Menus for Enhanced Focus and Well-Being

Alternate Title: Nourishing Minds: Strategic F&B Planning for Productive Meetings

results.originalTitle: Northern Kentucky Meeting Event Planner Guide

results.analysis:

Suggested Title: Unlocking Northern Kentucky: Your Comprehensive Guide to Meeting and Event Planning

Alternate Title: None

results.originalTitle: TED conference to move to San Diego

Enhancing the title with relevant industry terms and a focus on the implications for the travel sector would strengthen its appeal to travel professionals.
